headline: SWKS to Showcase 6G Power Amplifier: Will its Prospects Get a Boost?
summary: Skyworks Solutions' 6G demo with MediaTek, the Qorvo deal and a new Q2 outlook could shape what is next for the chipmaker.

headline: Honeywell Announces Filing of Form 10 Registration Statement for Planned Spin-Off of Honeywell Aerospace
summary: Honeywell (Nasdaq: HON) today announced the filing of its Form 10 registration statement ("Form 10") with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC") for the planned spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace, which will trade on the Nasdaq under the ticker "HONA." A copy of the Form 10 is available on the SEC website as well as Honeywell's Investor Relations website.

headline: $20+ Bn Connected Worker Global Market Forecasts 2025-2030 with Zebra Technologies, Honeywell International, Microsoft, and Hexagon Dominating
summary: The global connected worker market is projected to grow from USD 8.62 billion in 2025 to USD 20.18 billion by 2030, with an impressive CAGR of 18.5%. This growth is driven by the increasing adoption of remote and hybrid work models, which utilize advanced digital tools for seamless communication across distributed teams.
